meaning: n.装盖的人(或设备),制帽人,封口机,压盖机,托儿(奸商的同伙)
examples: Nuts Crashed Roasted Salmon Fillet, Saffron Risotto, Capper Sauce.
The capper comes equipped with an elevator cap feeder and with 304 stainless steel cladding as standard.
After a week of skiing with my buddies, I thought the perfect capper would be a group photo in the lodge.
The capper: I don't watch commercials--except for that Gap ad with the Earth, Wind and Fire song "September" in it.
Mr. Capper, now 57 and the chief executive of a San Francisco financial-services company, says that the Waldos were hardly slackers.
